derive.title: Repo verification idle
derive.detail: No repo-verified response is currently loaded for the mounted save slot.

derive.title: Repo verification confirmed
derive.detail: Repo-side verification data is present and marked trusted for the mounted save slot.

derive.title: Repo verification loaded
derive.detail: Repo-side response data is present, but trust is not yet established from the available verification state.

guardrails: Repo-verified panel presentation should stay distinct from client-side apply markers.
Trust labels summarize repo-verified state only; they do not widen write authority.
Boards remain excluded because Boards never use terminal/saves/.
